## What's Changed

- Added secure Tater's Picks narration requests between paired Tater Tube players and Tater Tube Core.
- Resolves narration text from the active server-side recommendation, so players submit only a recommendation ID and cannot send arbitrary speech.
- Added a persistent, expiring, and cancelable TTS request queue with stale-request recovery.
- Added authenticated Core claim and completion endpoints plus authenticated Player status, audio, and cancellation endpoints.
- Validates completed narration as WAV audio and limits uploads to 8 MB.
- Keeps TTS credentials and voice settings inside Tater while securely relaying the generated audio back to the requesting player.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Database migration 036 runs automatically. Update Tater Tube Core to 1.1.0 and Tater Tube Player to 1.5.11 to enable narrated recommendations.
